name: @dimforge/rapier2d-compat

en.when_to_use: Use it for deterministic, reproducible, constraint-heavy 2D mechanism simulations (gears, linkages, ragdolls, conveyor belts, motors). For simple bouncing-ball stacks, the lighter matter-js is enough. Augment boundary: it is a Rust/WASM solver with no rendering. You must first await RAPIER.init(), then read body.translation()/rotation() each frame and render with canvas, PixiJS, or Three.js.
en.why_valuable: The deterministic Rust/WASM solver includes joints, motors, sensors, and continuous collision detection (CCD), with precision and reproducibility far beyond JS physics libraries. AI cannot hand-write a reproducible constraint solver, so native code cannot handle this kind of precision mechanism. The -compat variant inlines the .wasm as base64 in JS, requiring no bundler or extra fetch.

data_in.note: Assemble the 2D scene one API object at a time, after first awaiting RAPIER.init(). gravity is {x,y}; when Y points upward, use a negative gravity y. Create a RigidBodyDesc for each body, then attach a ColliderDesc.

schema.gravity: { x:number, y:number } -- gravity vector; defaults to {x:0,y:-9.81}

bodies.type: 'dynamic' | 'fixed' | 'kinematicPositionBased' | 'kinematicVelocityBased' -- maps to the same-named static RigidBodyDesc method
bodies.collider: { shape:'cuboid', hx, hy } | { shape:'ball', radius } | { shape:'capsule', halfHeight, radius }
bodies.density?: number -- density, which determines mass; defaults to 1

when_to_use: 需要确定性、可复现、约束密集的 2D 机构模拟(齿轮/连杆/布娃娃/传送带/马达)时用它;简单弹球堆叠用更轻的 matter-js 就够。augment 边界:Rust/WASM 求解、零渲染,必须先 await RAPIER.init(),每帧读 body.translation()/rotation() 交给 canvas/pixi/three 画。
why_valuable: 确定性 Rust/WASM 求解器带关节/马达/传感器/连续碰撞(CCD),精度与可复现性远超 JS 物理库;AI 徒手写约束求解器不可能可复现,这类精密机构原生完全做不好。-compat 变体把 .wasm 以 base64 内联进 JS,无需 bundler/额外 fetch。

data_in.note: 用 API 逐条组装的 2D 场景;必须先 await RAPIER.init()。gravity 是 {x,y},Y 朝上时重力 y 取负。每个 body 先建 RigidBodyDesc 再挂 ColliderDesc。

schema.gravity: { x:number, y:number } —— 重力向量,默认 {x:0,y:-9.81}

bodies.type: 'dynamic' | 'fixed' | 'kinematicPositionBased' | 'kinematicVelocityBased' —— 映射 RigidBodyDesc 同名静态方法
bodies.collider: { shape:'cuboid', hx, hy } | { shape:'ball', radius } | { shape:'capsule', halfHeight, radius }
bodies.density?: number —— 密度(决定质量),默认 1

provides._note: headless-primitive:Rust/WASM 2D 物理、确定性、零渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;每帧读 body.translation()/rotation() 驱动 canvas/pixi/three。
provides.outputs: world.step() 后每个 RigidBody 的 translation()→{x,y} 与 rotation()→弧度;消费 AI 据此在 2D 渲染层画。EventQueue 可收碰撞/传感器事件。

api_surface.init: await RAPIER.init() 必须先执行(编译内联 base64 WASM)
api_surface.world: new RAPIER.World({x,y}); world.step(); world.timestep 默认 1/60
api_surface.joints: RAPIER.JointData.revolute/prismatic/fixed + world.createImpulseJoint(...);EventQueue 收碰撞/传感器事件

peer.note: rapier 零渲染:每帧 world.step() 后读 body.translation()/rotation(),用原生 CanvasRenderingContext2D(或 pixi/three)画。目录暂无专属 2D 渲染库时直接用 canvas 2d。

boot.note: compat 版把 WASM 以 base64 内联,无外部 fetch;必须 await RAPIER.init() 后才能用任何 API。零渲染,每帧 world.step() 后读 translation()/rotation() 同步渲染层。宿主须允许 WebAssembly(目录已有 sql-js/rdkit/hpcc-js-wasm 证明支持)。

isolation.evidence: +esm 同时 export default(RAPIER 命名空间)与大量 named exports(World, RigidBodyDesc, ColliderDesc, Vector2, ImpulseJoint, EventQueue, init...)已核。必须 await RAPIER.init()(init.d.ts:init():Promise<void>);WASM 以 base64 内联(compat build),无外部 fetch。签名:new World(gravity:{x,y})(world.d.ts:41 constructor(gravity:Vector...)); world.createRigidBody(RigidBodyDesc.dynamic()|.fixed()|.kinematicPositionBased()|.kinematicVelocityBased().setTranslation(x,y)) → RigidBody(rigid_body.d.ts:510/522/514/518/568); world.createCollider(ColliderDesc.cuboid(hx,hy)|.ball(r)|.capsule(hh,r)[.setRestitution(n).setDensity(n)], body) → Collider(collider.d.ts:634/567/574/758/731); world.step()(world.d.ts:72); body.translation()→Vector、body.rotation()→弧度。grep +esm:零 document.head/body、零 window.addEventListener、零 createElement('style')——纯 WASM 模拟、零渲染,配 2D canvas/pixi/three。唯一外部依赖是 init() 编译内联 WASM,需宿主允许 WebAssembly(catalog 先例 sql-js/rdkit/hpcc-js-wasm)。headless-primitive,shadow-safe。
